Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Apex Veterinarian to get the job done right.

“When my golden retriever ate mushrooms on our Bent Creek hike, Apex got us in immediately. They identified the exact species and had the antidote ready. Their knowledge of local toxins saved my dog's life.”

Meredith K. Emergency Care
Mar 15, 2025

“Dr. Wilson's winter arthritis plan for our 14-year-old lab has been transformative. The heated bed recommendation and joint supplements available at West Asheville's pet store have him moving comfortably again.”

Carlos R. Senior Pet Care
Jan 22, 2025

“After adopting a rescue terrified of downtown noises, Apex's behaviorist helped us gradually acclimate her using recordings of Asheville street sounds. Now she handles festivals and buskers like a pro.”

Sophie T. Behavioral Consultations
Nov 5, 2024

“They discovered my cat's tooth resorption during a routine cleaning - a condition common in older Asheville cats. The painless extraction and recovery plan made all the difference in her comfort.”

James L. Dental Care
Sep 18, 2024

“Our vegan household wanted ethical pet food options. Apex helped us find balanced local products at the WNC Farmers Market that keep our dogs thriving on plant-based nutrition.”

Natalie W. Nutritional Counseling
Aug 3, 2024

“Their tick prevention protocol for our trail-running border collie is flawless. Three years with Apex and we've never had a tick-borne illness, despite daily runs on the Mountains-to-Sea Trail.”

Derrick P. Preventive Care
Jun 29, 2024
Apex Veterinarian

Trusted veterinary professionals serving Asheville, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-vet-r92
